items.title: Former WVU Guard Javon Small Makes Loud Statement in Summer League

items.title: WHOA  ... did not know Javon Small's elevator went that high. Giant driving dunk by Grizzlies guard to cap off a 26-point effort as Memphis beats Golden State 106-85. Boozer and Yaxel were just okay in this one.
items.author: John Hollinger
items.body_excerpt: WHOA  ... did not know Javon Small's elevator went that high. Giant driving dunk by Grizzlies guard to cap off a 26-point effort as Memphis beats Golden State 106-85. Boozer and Yaxel were just okay in this one.

items.title: Yaxel Lendeborg's absolute favorite thing to do is sprint in transition into a quick post up against a guard. Just did it to Javon Small to create an open shot for a teammate, even though they didn't get a bucket out of it; Yax is big enough and fast enough that this ploy should
items.author: John Hollinger
items.body_excerpt: Yaxel Lendeborg's absolute favorite thing to do is sprint in transition into a quick post up against a guard. Just did it to Javon Small to create an open shot for a teammate, even though they didn't get a bucket out of it; Yax is big enough and fast enough that this ploy should translate.

items.title: Over at the other gym where Javon Small just had a 19-point first half for Memphis against Golden State, with both teams playing their main guys. Think Small is absolutely a real NBA player.
items.author: John Hollinger
items.body_excerpt: Over at the other gym where Javon Small just had a 19-point first half for Memphis against Golden State, with both teams playing their main guys. Think Small is absolutely a real NBA player.

items.title: The only two-way contract free agent for the Memphis Grizzlies is Rayan Rupert, a 2023 second round pick. Richie Saunders (ACL) could slide into that spot with 2025 second round picks Javon Small and Jahmai Mashack occupying the other two spots.
items.author: Law Murray 📘
items.body_excerpt: The only two-way contract free agent for the Memphis Grizzlies is Rayan Rupert, a 2023 second round pick. Richie Saunders (ACL) could slide into that spot with 2025 second round picks Javon Small and Jahmai Mashack occupying the other two spots.
